title: Mending Bob
description: Brings back the bob when repairing items with Mending
body:
In 1.21.11 Mojang made the change:
> Items will no longer "bob" whenever their durability changes, such as when losing durability from an attack, or repaired by Mending

Myself and some others found this to be a useful feature, so i've reintroduced it into the game for items enchanted with mending. **The bob is back baby!**
